etymology.description: Semantic: 㣇 (silk threads); Phonetic: 胃 (wèi, "stomach")
etymology.interpretation: The character 彙 combines the semantic component 㣇, which indicates a collection or grouping, with the phonetic element 胃 (wèi, "stomach"), suggesting a relation to accumulation or gathering. This illustrates the idea of assembling or collecting items, akin to gathering threads.
etymology.simplification: 汇(彙): The simplified form replaces 㣇 with 氵(shuǐ, "water"), retaining phonetic similarity while reducing strokes.

examples.chinese: 这个计划阶段需要大量的数据汇总(這個計劃階段需要大量的數據彙總)。
examples.pinyin: Zhège jìhuà jiēduàn xūyào dàliàng de shùjù huìzǒng.
examples.english: This phase of the plan requires a large amount of data collection.

examples.chinese: 他们在那里进行汇报(他們在那裡進行彙報)。
examples.english: They are conducting a briefing there.

examples.chinese: 这些文件是公司重要的信息汇编(這些文件是公司重要的信息彙編)。
examples.pinyin: Zhèxiē wénjiàn shì gōngsī zhòngyào de xìnxī huìbiān.
examples.english: These documents are an important compilation of the company's information.
